_note: Traditional ascent above Arnulf of Metz to the Merovingian kings. The Merovech->...->Chlothar I chain is documented history; the Blithild -> Arnoald -> Arnulf link is the medieval FABRICATION that modern historians reject. Disputed nodes are labelled as such so nothing is presented as fact.
